reading.title: Reading: Things I enjoy
reading.passage: I enjoy reading books in my free time. He enjoys playing football with friends. She hates waiting in long queues. I miss living in my hometown. We should avoid wasting too much time.

questions.question: The writer enjoys reading books.
questions.explanation: "I enjoy reading books in my free time."

reading.title: Reading: Too much, not enough
reading.passage: This bag is too heavy for me to carry. He isn't tall enough to reach the shelf. The room is too small for ten people. This coffee is too hot to drink now.

questions.question: The bag is light enough to carry easily.
questions.explanation: "This bag is too heavy for me to carry."

questions.question: Why can't he reach the shelf?
questions.explanation: "He isn't tall enough to reach the shelf."
